changelog: Bundled FlickReels proxy — paid-episode unlocking works out of the box
FlickReels Fast/Slow picker — Fast mode unlocks 89 paid eps in ~3 min via parallel workers
Add FlickReels + AnyReel platforms (full mobile-API bypass)
Add ShortTV / ShortMax (free episodes; locked are server-gated)
Add Facebook profile reels scrape (cookies for full-profile)
Settings window: HiDPI fix + scrollable tabs + readable text
Fix GoodShort downloads freezing the device (AES decryptor bug)
Fix DramaBox episode filenames zero-padded (Ep01.mp4 etc.)
Build: bundle PySocks for SOCKS5 proxy support
